corrections.current: Τιμόθεος καὶ Ἀπολλώνιος ὁ τοῦ Γενναίου
corrections.correct: Τιμόθεος καὶ Ἀπολλώνιος ὁ τοῦ Γενναίου,
corrections.note: Comma visible after Γενναίου before ἔτι δὲ.
Body reads ὑφῆψεν; transcript has apparatus variant ἐνέπρησεν.
Lemma/variant is printed as συνετελέσαντο V; initial syllables were lost.
Printed abbreviation includes the prefix συν-.
Apparatus reads ἀνελυσεν as the variant before V*; transcript misread the letters.

notes: Running head and page number match. Body line numbers in margin were not incorrectly captured as verse numbers beyond the existing verse numerals. Apparatus otherwise appears consistent with the scan.
